rule_in_code.primary_way: way with larger np.max(wf)  # signed max, not abs
rule_in_code.early_energy: sum of squares or abs depending on script — S2 uses sum(wf[:N]**2) see code

adjudication.paper_should_say: peak index = argmax of signed amplitude (not |·|); on V2 S1/S2 canon data all samples non-negative so |·| coincides; primary = larger signed max of the two ways
